creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-15 21:41:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-github_creator Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is a short script you can run from within an existing git
  repository to create a remote repo on Github using a previously
  created account. This does not create Github accounts (and that
  violates the terms of service).
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/github_creator/
  
  PR:             ports/128876
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3251    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/p5-github_creator/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-github_creator/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-github_creator/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-github_creator/pkg-plist (new)
